name: yantr
desc: YANTR is a powerful, cross-platform alternative to Umbrel — a Docker-based app store designed for flexible, server-grade self-hosting. It lets you deploy ready…
descFull: YANTR is a powerful, cross-platform alternative to Umbrel — a Docker-based app store designed for flexible, server-grade self-hosting. It lets you deploy ready-to-run apps — from Bitcoin nodes and privacy tools to file converters — all packaged as lightweight containers, giving you more control, portability, and freedom over your setup.
